name: Yaoyorozu Momo
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

With how much she likes to pry into others relationships, Mina has discovered a few secrets from the remaining two still faithful couples, the most important being Momo, who seems to be sadder with each passing day.

Now it is time to push her to seek some warmth from you after witnessing how dead frozen her relationship with Todoroki is.

(Part 4 of 7)

List of what's yet to be released!

2- Toru Hagakure! How dare you to ignore the invisible woman of your class! Toru is tired of being left behind so she comes to surprise you in your room, even if she has a boyfriend already.

3- Tsuyu Asui! Your affairs had been discovered by Tsuyu, who instead of revealing the secrets to their boyfriends decide to spy on you and the girls under Mina's approval, now it's her turn to have fun! (She's the only one single of the girls)

4- Class A! Your affairs never stopped, you all managed to keep it as a secret but the lack of fulfillment from their partners pushed the girls to break up with them so they can be with you.
